task_summary: Repair the mew-wisp cat left eye so it is balanced and no longer tear-like.
tests_run: MEW_GHOST_TERMINAL_WIDTH=50 UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/mew_wisp.py --fixture-terminal --watch-count 1 --interval 0
notes: Mew-first SP38 used gpt-5.5 from the current repo root after pulling latest origin/main. Task #63/session #94 made the upper left eye three cells wide like the right eye, but the operator rejected the visual result because a lower isolated dot still read as a tear. Task #64/session #95 removed the lower dot, preserved the balanced upper eye and SP37 forelegs, and added focused tests for one-cell and lower-dot regressions. Operator verification passed: focused pytest 55 passed, git diff --check passed, and fixture terminal smoke at width 50 was inspected. Product-code rescue edits: 0. Issue #35 was updated with the repeated visual-acceptance evidence.
